name: Kwan Yong Holdings Limited
summary: Kwan Yong Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides general building and construction services in Singapore. It undertakes building construction works of institutional buildings, such as education institutions, hospitals, and nursing homes; and commercial buildings comprising office buildings and restaurants, as well as industrial and residential buildings. The company was incorporated in 2018 and is headquartered in Singapore. Kwan Yong Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Ideal Smart Ventures Limited.
